Hindu spirituality does not put a ban on money. It seeks to conquer it for the divine
alld moral use of mtn. To neglect it would be to Wt'OQUU!n the enemy who will use
the money ror the increase of evil. We Should not fore share all ~alh. but must
use it for social purposes. One has to be entirely selfless, saupulous. exact and
careful in the use of money. Purity in matters of money in a great virtue (artha
SUddhi),
5elf.protection is to be always kept in view. Surely the self has
always to be protected. wealth is one of the great protectors.
